task: Howdy! We are going to pick up on the branch where we left off. Do you recall the P2 that must be fixed?
Nice. while this undergoes thorough review, please bring up the remaining task list for this branch in order of execution.
Excellent. Commit all staged changes. If you encounter any quality checks address them with professional, enterprise grade best practices. Then, please execute on T052 to T056.

The patch mostly contains typing cleanups, but the new mypy configuration for scripts/ is ineffective as written. Since the stated relaxation does not actually apply, the patch does not
  fully implement its intended behavior.

  Review comment:

  - [P2] Fix the mypy override so it actually applies to scripts — E:\projects\ado-git-repo-insights\pyproject.toml:136-143
    mypy does not treat files under scripts/ as scripts.* modules here — for example scripts/run_ci_parity.py is loaded as module run_ci_parity, and mypy src/ tests/ scripts/ --no-
    incremental now prints Warning: unused section(s) in pyproject.toml: module = ['scripts.*']. That means the new “relaxed” settings never take effect for any script, so CI/preflight is
    still enforcing repo-wide strict rules on them despite the comment saying otherwise.
user_feedback_text:
The patch mostly contains typing cleanups, but the new mypy configuration for scripts/ is ineffective as written. Since the stated relaxation does not actually apply, the patch does not
  fully implement its intended behavior.

  Review comment:

  - [P2] Fix the mypy override so it actually applies to scripts — E:\projects\ado-git-repo-insights\pyproject.toml:136-143
    mypy does not treat files under scripts/ as scripts.* modules here — for example scripts/run_ci_parity.py is loaded as module run_ci_parity, and mypy src/ tests/ scripts/ --no-
    incremental now prints Warning: unused section(s) in pyproject.toml: module = ['scripts.*']. That means the new “relaxed” settings never take effect for any script, so CI/preflight is
    still enforcing repo-wide strict rules on them despite the comment saying otherwise.

task: Sounds good. You are confident in T052-T056 to mark complete?
Excellent work. Please remember this solid session. We are going to pick back up here in a moment in a new session to cover T057-T065.
